security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.github.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com

bundle.shortDescription: Diagnose token waste and coordinate external compression strategies.
bundle.longDescription: A local-first desktop control plane that diagnoses AI-agent token waste, recommends compatible compression strategies, tracks updates, and measures cost per successful task.
